abilities.name: Stab
abilities.description: Nyx lunges forward with a dagger, striking the killer for damage and sustaining herself. The outcome depends on positioning, rewarding precise backstabs with stronger effects.

abilities.name: Crouch
abilities.description: Nyx enters a stealth state by crouching with her dagger in hand, silencing her footsteps and preparing for an ambush.

abilities.name: Ritual
abilities.description: Nyx carves a Ritual into the ground, marking a respawn point that enables her second life through Oath.
